input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only the tests with the `Category=Integration` trait in their xUnit project. Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then provide the correct command.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-36a9c95c15574aa584f16173aa3e0f43 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | head -50", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All 5 integration tests passed. The command to run only tests with the `Category=Integration` trait is:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the `--filter` option with the trait name and value to select only matching tests. All 5 matched tests succeeded.
